title: E-Commerce Store
text:
​The NIST Store is an online shopping experience where customers can order NIST products and services including calibration services, Standard Reference Data products, and Standard Reference Materials.
In compliance with Executive Order 14247, checks will no longer be an approved payment method after September 30, 2025.
The annual price update for the calibration services will take place on March 1st 2026. All orders after March 1st will be at the updated fee.
